title: Lucid Group (LCID) Q3 2025 Earnings Transcript
text: Lucid's Q3 2025 earnings call revealed management discussion of production challenges, guidance reductions, and strategic priorities for 2026. Management detailed the reasons for the second consecutive quarter of production guidance cuts, citing demand softness and supply chain challenges. Discussion centered on the Gravity SUV ramp success and early progress on the midsize vehicle program. The robotaxi partnership with Uber emerged as a key strategic focus for long-term value creation. Cost reduction initiatives received emphasis as management acknowledged the need to reduce cash burn significantly. Analyst questions focused on profitability timelines, capital requirements, and the sustainability of PIF funding. The call conveyed a company in transition, managing multiple product programs while facing near-term operational and financial headwinds.
